text: We love our nex playground. Our whole family play together.
text_zh: 我们喜欢我们的 Nex Playground。全家一起玩。

text: Meanwhile a fulfillment worker has searched everywhere for that damn thing and ended up INF-ing it.
text_zh: 与此同时，一个仓库员工找遍了那个该死的玩意儿，最后把它报废了。

text: Makes me nervous that people live paycheck to paycheck it scares me lol
text_zh: 看到人们还在过着月光族的生活让我有点担心，吓死我了 lol

text: Buying gifts while you don’t have the money makes no sense to me
text_zh: 没钱还买礼物，这在我看来没啥道理

text: Fun fact - the bottom shelves so easily lift. I once put a Stanley under a shelf, completely forgot about it, went back like 5 months later and it was still here.
text_zh: 趣闻 - 底下的架子很容易抬起来。有一次我把一个 Stanley 放在架子下面，完全忘了，过了大概 5 个月回去找，它还在那儿。

text: This is why fulfillment can’t find anything
text_zh: 这就是为什么配送员找不到东西的原因

text: This explains why store says three in hand but can’t nobody find it haha. Glad you got it though
text_zh: 这下子就解释了为什么店里显示有货但没人能找到哈哈。很高兴你拿到了。

text: ngl any other time I'd be mad. but the way its really sold out you win Mom 😂
text_zh: 说实话，换成别的时候我肯定生气。但看样子确实卖光了，你赢了妈妈 😂

text: nd then she never said she lives paycheck to paycheck lmao she just said shes buying other gifts and she has the funds for this later she will come get it now everyone leave this lady alone just trying to make her kids happy
text_zh: 然后她从来没说过自己是月光族 lmao 她只是说她在买别的礼物，她有钱过一阵子来拿，现在大家别打扰这位女士了，她只是想让她孩子开心

text: It’s fsa hsa eligible on their website incase anyone wants to use that money instead of their everyday money
text_zh: 万一有人想用 FSA HSA 的钱来买，而不是日常的钱，他们在官网有这个选项

text: I live in a city with dozens of Targets. No shelf stays untouched or even stocked long enough to hide anything. 😭
text_zh: 我住的城市有几十家Target。没有货架能长时间不被翻动，甚至都没法长时间备好货来藏东西。😭

text: This is why credit cards are handy. Just buy it with cc then pay it off 2 days later when you get paid.
text_zh: 这就是信用卡好用的原因。直接刷信用卡，两天后拿到钱再还上。

text: Lucky you! Glad you could get it for the kiddos. At our local target they make us pay anything from that area just at the electronics register.
text_zh: 你真幸运！很高兴你能给孩子们买。在我们当地的Target，我们得在电子产品柜台付款，无论是什么。

text: LMAO this is so smart 😭😂
text_zh: 笑死，这太聪明了了 😭😂

text: My kids got one last Christmas from Santa and still play with it daily. It’s amazing!
text_zh: 我孩子去年圣诞节收到的，一直是圣 the Santa 送的，现在还天天玩。太棒了！

text: you can literally buy it on amazon…?
text_zh: 你能在亚马逊上直接买到……？

text: So like Kinect or Wii?
text_zh: 所以是Kinect还是Wii？

text: Technically it was yours because you got to it first lol
text_zh: 严格来说是你的，因为你先到的 lol

text: So this is why things stay “1 in stock” and it’s no where to be found 😂😂😂 I ain’t even mad! You do what you have to do for your kids
text_zh: 所以这就是为什么东西总是“仅剩1件”但到处都找不到的原因 😂😂😂 我一点都不生气！你为了孩子什么都做得出来

text: Ours keep them locked up and you have to check out right there lol
text_zh: 我们的锁起来了，你得当场退房才行 lol

text: I got me playground on a huge flash sale from nex on TikTok shop
text_zh: 我在TikTok商店的Nex买的游乐场，当时有个很大的闪购

text: throwing off counts 😅
text_zh: 计数不准 😅

text: So you hid one in the store until you had the money to go back and get it?
text_zh: 所以你把它藏在店里，直到你有钱回去拿？

text: I'm so glad o ordered it on Black Friday 190 with a case at Sam's Club
text_zh: 真开心我在黑色星期五以 190 美元加上一个盒子在 Sam's Club 订了

text: Moms for the win i aint mas
text_zh: 妈妈们赢了，我不是妈妈。

text: Hiding that probably cost a seasonal employee their job
text_zh: 这玩意儿藏起来可能让一个季节性员工丢了工作

text: You guys are going to LOVE it! My mom got him it last Christmas. Best gift ever!
text_zh: 你们都会爱上它的！我妈去年圣诞节送给他的。最好的礼物！

text: We have it and LOVE IT!!
text_zh: 我们有了，超爱！！

text: Good job, girl!! There is NOTHING wrong with doing that for your kids!!!! ♥️🎄
text_zh: 干得好，女孩！！为你的孩子做这些没有任何不对！！！！♥️🎄

text: Family and I just opened ours and it’s so fun!!!
text_zh: 我和家人刚打开我们的，太好玩了！！！

text: dg had their 30% roblox on friday, and I noticed we never got more at our store after the Thanksgiving sale, so I put 3 any amount cards, in the office supplies under the mailer boxes, came back nd bought them, the cashier side eyed me and said where did you find these? ohh they were on the back wall laying there soo weird🤣😅
text_zh: 周五dg店里 roblox 打八折，我注意到感恩节促销之后我们店里就再也没进货了，我就拿了三个任意金额的卡，放到了办公用品区，邮寄盒子下面，回来之后买了，收银员斜眼看我，说你在哪儿找到的？哦，它们就在后面墙上放着，怪奇怪的🤣😅

text: I kept checking their website. It first said one wouldn’t be delivered until January 2, and then bam! I checked and it said would be delivered 12/24. I checked out so fast and sure 💩, it arrived Christmas Eve. I placed my order on the 22nd. So happy I was able to score one!
text_zh: 我一直在查他们的网站。一开始说1月2号才能送到，然后突然！我一查，说12月24号送到。我立马就下单了，而且确实 💩，它在圣诞夜送到了。我是22号下的单。太高兴了能抢到一个！

text: the people yearn for xbox kinect😔
text_zh: 人们渴望Xbox Kinect 😔

text: Yall do know it’s a ad 😂😂
text_zh: 你们不知道这是广告吗 😂😂

text: We got our back in July when it went on sale. I was waiting patiently half a year to finally connect it! It got connected today and luckily the play pass was half off too!$
text_zh: 我们七月份促销的时候买的。我等了半年多，终于连上了！今天连好了，幸运的是游戏通行证也半价了！$

text: Not my FYP getting super local 😂 HEYY girly!
text_zh: 不是吧，我的FYP怎么这么本地化了😂 嗨，姐妹！

text: My friend got one for her son this year and I can’t believe how expensive they got. I got my son’s last year for $130, but they were $160 regular price last Christmas.
text_zh: 我朋友今年给她儿子买了一个，我真不敢相信他们变多贵了。我去年给我儿子买的是 130 美元，但他们去年圣诞节的正常价格是 160 美元。

text: we got the nex playground on such a good sale during black friday! with cash back rewards and sale and a gift card in return, it ended up being like $120
text_zh: 我们在黑色星期五以非常好的价格买到了 Nex Playground！加上返现和折扣，还有礼品卡，最后差不多花了 120 美元

text: My grandma used to do this with me and my mom would go back and get it when she’d get payed. Hell yeah mama 🥹🩷
text_zh: 我奶奶以前也这样跟我玩，等我妈发了工资再来接我。太棒了妈妈 🥹🩷

text: Made me want to buy one now 🤭
text_zh: 看得我想现在就去买一个了 🤭

text: My husband got my son and I one for Christmas off the TikTok shop for 150$ and it’s amazing we’ve been on it so much! And it’s a very family oriented game system!
text_zh: 我老公在 TikTok shop 上给我儿子和我一人买了一个，才 150 美元，太棒了，我们玩了好多！而且这是个很适合家庭的游戏机！

text: I wanted it till i heard you need a damn subscription for it too
text_zh: 我本来想买的，直到听说还要付费订阅 💔

text: This is why we always look in random spots for things like that
text_zh: 这就是为什么我们总是在奇怪的地方找东西

text: Me and my mom always did this it was our “layaway” 😁
text_zh: 我和我妈妈总是这么做，这是我们的“分期付款”😁

text: Good for you. People act like you stole it👌🏾
text_zh: 真为你高兴。有些人好像你偷来的一样 👌🏾

text: Like layaway 😅 I would do the same! Haha
text_zh: 像分期付款一样 😅 我也会一样！哈哈

text: My kids make mud krabby patties, get scabs and play kick the can.
text_zh: 我家的孩子会玩泥巴汉堡包，然后受伤了再玩踢罐子。

text: It uses AI😞
text_zh: 它用AI 😞

text: Where does your target have these bags at?
text_zh: 你家Target这些包放哪儿的？

text: Target yikes
text_zh: Target 真是的 😅

text: I think they have it in my Walmart in Minnesota
text_zh: 我觉得我的沃尔玛在明尼苏达州有卖

text: The hate in the comments are killing me & hilarious 😭
text_zh: 评论里的恶意攻击看得我心梗又觉得好笑 😭

text: uhm
What’s the hype abt this thing ,it’s exhausting now 😩
text_zh: 这玩意儿有什么好大惊小怪的，玩得好累啊 😩

text: this is actually so smart
text_zh: 这玩意儿真的太聪明了！

text: OMGGG!!! You’re soo lucky! Lol. I wanted to get one for my kids too.
text_zh: 我的天！！！你太幸运了！哈哈。我也想给我的孩子们买一个。

text: ✨️layaway✨️👑
text_zh: ✨️分期付款✨️👑

text: Omg it’s SOOOOO COOL!! We started playing it when he opened it yesterday and I love it!!
text_zh: 我的天，太酷了！！他昨天打开就和我们一起玩了，我超爱！

text: It’s so fun! We got it for Christmas! Highly recommend!!!
text_zh: 太好玩了！我们圣诞节买的！强烈推荐！！！

text: I recognize pinole target right away bc of verizon next to it😂 fyp too localllll🫣
text_zh: 我一眼就认出是Pinole Target，因为旁边有Verizon😂 FYP，离我好近啊！🫣

text: and i was going to get a Wii, but I think i want this instead
text_zh: 我本来要去买 Wii 的，但我觉得我想要这个了

text: it’s so fun I use it alone when they go to bed 😭
text_zh: 太好玩了，他们睡着了我自己一个人玩 😭

text: I had no idea this existed 😭 now I need it lol
text_zh: 我居然不知道这个东西，😭 现在我必须要一个了哈哈

text: I got my son one for Christmas! I can’t wait to try the working out part of it !!
text_zh: 我圣诞节给我儿子买了一个！我迫不及待想试试它的健身功能了！！

text: Bro my sister got this for her kids and I was playing on it the whole night… this game is sm worth the money
text_zh: 我姐给她孩子买了这个，我玩了一整晚……这个游戏真的太值钱了

text: I have one and I love it. I use it for kids at school and for my nieces and nephews
text_zh: 我有一个，我爱死了。我在学校给孩子们用，也给我的侄子侄女们用

text: We’re playing it right now it’s so cool!!
text_zh: 我们现在就正在玩，太酷了！！

text: bro ive been to this target 3 times this week😭
text_zh: 兄弟，我这周都来这个Target三次了😭

text: @Nex Playground 🥰
text_zh: @Nex Playground 🥰

text: @MaKayla Chance
text_zh: @麦卡拉·钱斯

text: i know someone was pissed looking for that last one in stock but good for you mama i’d do the same 😂🤍
text_zh: 我知道有人为了找最后一个现货可愁坏了，不过恭喜你啊姐妹，我也会这么做的 😂🤍

text: comments annoying asl 😭
text_zh: 评论烦死了😭

text: Item in stock, no it's not, item in stock, no it's not. Self stocking messed it up so now another parent cannot get it for their kid 😒
text_zh: 商品有货，实际上没有，商品有货，实际上没有。自动补货搞砸了，现在别的家长就没办法给他们的孩子买了 😒

text:
@☆: STOP using plastic, AI, vapes, cigarettes, google, overusing planes, throwing clothes away, funding harmful companies, buying products you don't need...
START recycling, giving food to the homeless, protesting, giving old clothes to charities/thriftshops, picking trash up, turning light off when you don't need it, donating to charities, using public transport/bikes...
SWITCH from Google to ECOSIA or Ocean Hero. Every time you search ECOSIA plants another tree seed. Every time you search Ocean Hero collects plastic from the ocean.
text_zh:
“@☆: 别再用塑料、AI、电子烟、香烟、谷歌了，别过度坐飞机、扔衣服、资助有害公司、买不需要的东西...
开始回收、给无家可归者食物、抗议、把旧衣服捐给慈善机构/二手店、捡垃圾、不用电灯时关掉、捐款给慈善机构、使用公共交通/自行车...
从谷歌换成ECOSIA或Ocean Hero。每次你搜索ECOSIA都会种下一颗种子。每次你搜索Ocean Hero都会从海洋收集塑料。

text: hiding it is crazy .. get yo bread up
text_zh: 藏起来太离谱了… 努力赚钱吧

text: Girl why would you do that
text_zh: 姐妹，你为什么要做那种事

text: I just know AP was up someone’s butt about the counts being off 😩😂
text_zh: 我敢肯定AP因为数字不对跟别人吵翻天了😩😂

text: Lmaooo ngl I would’ve did this too cause it would’ve been gone !!!
text_zh: 哈哈哈哈，老实说我也会这么做，因为早就没了！！！

text: Girl was willing to do anything she tried activating her domain expansion in the begining
text_zh: 妹子为了它什么都愿意做，一开始她就尝试发动她的领域展开

text: My 8 year old loves it!
text_zh: 我8岁的儿子喜欢它！

text: One of the best gifts I got my baby girl this year! We played for an hour straight the games are so fun, fruit ninja had my husband sweating after 90 seconds 😂😂
text_zh: 今年我送给我女儿最好的礼物之一！我们玩了一个小时，游戏太好玩了，玩水果忍者我老公90秒就满头大汗了 😂😂

text: I thought I was the only one who did this lol
text_zh: 我还以为只有我一个人这么做呢 lol
